title: HERE Maps API keys should not be disclosed
description: HERE Technologies provides mapping, routing, and location services. HERE API keys authenticate requests to mapping, geocoding, routing, and traffic APIs. Exposing keys allows unauthorized API usage at your expense and potential abuse of location-based services.
recommendation: Remove HERE API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately at platform.here.com.
impact: Unauthorized map rendering, geocoding, and routing API calls at your expense, and potential exposure of location query data.

checks.message: HERE Maps API key detected in variable assignment. HERE API keys authenticate requests to mapping, geocoding, routing, traffic, and places APIs. Exposing this key allows unauthorized API consumption billed to your account, access to your usage analytics and location query history, and potential abuse for data scraping. Rotate immediately at platform.here.com and review API usage logs.
